title: 菊花賞の後に・からっぽの両手

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide both fail to win
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This loss and the difficulties she faced in training
weigh heavily on Narita Taishin, and she breaks
from mental and physical exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She confesses that she needs a break from both
training and racing.
